description.ko: 식물이 첨단 컴퓨팅과 결합하여 자가 지속 가능한 디지털 생태계를 형성하는 포스트 생물학 시대의 자연 진화를 시각적으로 표현한 작품입니다.
description.en: A visual representation of the evolution of nature in a post-biological era, where flora has integrated with advanced computing to create a self-sustaining digital ecosystem.

prompt: Hyper-realistic close-up of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic flower with translucent crystalline petals infused with glowing blue circuitry and fiber-optic veins. The core of the flower emits a soft pulsating holographic light. Surrounded by a dark, digital forest atmosphere with floating data bits and neon-lit moss. Cinematic bokeh, 8k resolution, iridescent textures, ethereal lighting.
